REFERENCE: The reference appears to be a real publication with some minor issues. The paper 'Heterologous infection and vaccination shapes immunity against SARS-CoV-2 variants' by Reynolds et al. was indeed published in Science in early 2022 (Volume 375, Issue 6577, pages 183-192). However, there are two issues: 1) The title has a grammatical error ('shapes' vs 'shape'), and 2) The DOI contains a typo ('sciwnce' vs 'science'). Despite these errors, the reference is identifiable as a real publication. The actual DOI is 10.1126/science.abm0811.
